now_playing: 🎵 Now Playing Title: {1} Duration: {2} Requested by: {3}
play_added: ✅ Added to Queue Title: {1} Position: {2}
play_timeout: ⏱️ Search timed out Please try again.
play_usage: Usage: /{0} [song name or URL] Supports: YouTube URLs, search queries, reply to audio/video
stopped: ⏹️ Playback Stopped Left the voice chat. By: {0}
error_no_call: ❌ No active voice chat found. Please start a voice chat first!
error_no_file: ❌ File not found. Contact {0} for support.
error_no_audio: ❌ Could not extract audio from file.
error_tg_server: ❌ Telegram server error. Please try again later.
error_not_admin: ❌ You need to be an admin to use this command.
error_auth: ❌ You are not authorized to use this command.
error_maintenance: ⚠️ Bot is under maintenance. Please try again later.
error_anonymous: ❌ You appear to be anonymous! To use this bot: 1. Click on your profile picture in the chat 2. Select 'Show Profile' or disable 'Remain Anonymous' 3. Then use the command again
error_bot_permissions: ❌ Bot lacks required permissions! The bot needs: • Manage Voice Chats • Invite Users via Link • Delete Messages Please grant these permissions to continue.
error_download_timeout: ⏱️ Download timed out Please try again later.
dl_active: 📥 This file is already being downloaded...
admin_mode_on: 🔒 Admin-only mode enabled. Only admins can play music. By: {0}
admin_mode_off: 🔓 Admin-only mode disabled. Everyone can play music. By: {0}
maintenance_on: ⚠️ Maintenance mode enabled. Bot will only respond to sudo users. By: {0}
maintenance_off: ✅ Maintenance mode disabled. Bot is now available to everyone. By: {0}
start_pm: Welcome to {0}! I can play music and videos in your Telegram voice chats. Features: • Play audio from YouTube • Play video from YouTube • Support for Telegram media files • Queue management • Playlist support Add me to a group and use /play to start!
help_main: 🎵 Arc Music Bot - Help Center Select a category below to view commands:
help_play: 🎵 Play Commands /play [song] - Play audio from YouTube /play [url] - Play from YouTube URL /vplay [video] - Play video in VC /play (reply) - Play replied media Supports: YouTube, SoundCloud, Spotify links
help_queue: 📋 Queue Commands /queue - View current queue /now - Show now playing /clear - Clear the queue /shuffle - Shuffle queue Queue supports pagination for large lists
help_controls: 🎛️ Playback Controls /pause - Pause playback /resume - Resume playback /skip - Skip current track /stop - Stop and leave VC /seek [time] - Seek to position Example: /seek 1:30
help_admin: 👨‍💼 Admin Commands /auth [user] - Authorize user /unauth [user] - Remove authorization /adminmode - Toggle admin-only mode /setlang - Set language /thumbnail - Toggle thumbnails
help_settings: ⚙️ Settings /setlang - Change bot language /thumbnail - Toggle thumbnail display /adminmode - Restrict to admins only Languages: English, Hindi, Spanish, Arabic, Indonesian, Burmese
help_sudo: 🔐 Sudo Commands /sudo [user] - Add sudo user /delsudo [user] - Remove sudo /blacklist [id] - Blacklist chat/user /broadcast [msg] - Broadcast message /maintenance - Maintenance mode /active - Show active calls /stats - Bot statistics /restart - Restart bot
help_tools: 🔧 Utility Commands /ping - Check bot latency /id - Get chat/user IDs /info - Bot information These commands work in all chats
cleanup_done: 🧹 Cleanup Complete Disk: • Cache: {0} • Downloads: {1} • Freed: {2:.2f} MB Database: • Chats removed: {3}
stats_text: 📊 Bot Statistics Users: {0} Chats: {1} Active Calls: {2} Assistants: {3}
not_authorized: ❌ You are not authorized to use this command.
